display_name_sources: source_facts.name: wabt; source_facts.description expands the name as Web Assembly Binary Toolkit.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub repository; repository README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/WebAssembly/wabt; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a WebAssembly toolkit; source_facts.executables lists wasm/wat conversion, validation, objdump, decompile, and stats tools.
